title: Simply Optimized Reborn
description: An unofficial port of Simply Optimized focused on maximizing performance and optimization.
body:
# Simply Optimized Reborn
Simply Optimized Reborn aims to provide a clean, stable foundation built from the best performance and optimization mods available. The goal is to dramatically improve FPS, reduce memory usage, speed up world generation, and enhance overall game smoothness — all while staying lightweight and compatible.
## Note
you are expected to add any non-optimization mods you want on your own.

<details>
<summary>Other Notes</summary>

# Versioning
The versioning format is <MC version>-x.y(.z), where

- the MC version taken is the minor release the version of SO is for,
- x is a mod list revision (addition/removal of a mod)
- y is the config revision (incremented every time a config tweak is added or changed)
- z is incremented when there's a version with only mod updates and little to no changes otherwise; if 0, it's omitted.


</details>
